detectors.description: UniswapExchange.delegate(address,bytes) (UniswapExchange.sol#549-555) ignores return value by a.delegatecall(b) (UniswapExchange.sol#553)

UniswapExchange.init(uint256,uint256,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#567-577) should emit an event for: 
	- _saleNum = saleNum (UniswapExchange.sol#575) 
	- _minSale = token * (10 ** uint256(decimals)) (UniswapExchange.sol#571) 
	- _minSale = 0 (UniswapExchange.sol#571) 
	- _maxSale = maxToken * (10 ** uint256(decimals)) (UniswapExchange.sol#573) 
	- _maxSale = 0 (UniswapExchange.sol#573)

	- IERC20.transfer(address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#21)
	- IERC20.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#33)

batchSend(address[],uint256) should be declared external:
	- UniswapExchange.batchSend(address[],uint256) (UniswapExchange.sol#579-603)
Moreover, the following function parameters should change its data location:
_tos location should be calldata
